title: Average Value of Even Numbers That Are Divisible by Three
titleCn: 可被三整除的偶数的平均值

testcases.input: nums = [1,3,6,10,12,15] Output: 9 Explanation: 6 and 12 are even numbers that are divisible by 3. (6 + 12) / 2 = 9.
testcases.expectedOutput: 9 Explanation: 6 and 12 are even numbers that are divisible by 3. (6 + 12) / 2 = 9.

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,4,7,10] Output: 0 Explanation: There is no single number that satisfies the requirement, so return 0.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There is no single number that satisfies the requirement, so return 0.
